name: Headcase
author: Poki
description: Norman Nogging was just a regular Joe, staying up late reading comic books, when a bolt of Cosmic Lightning struck and sent him to a crazy world where everyone walked on walls. Norman iw now a superhero - with a really big head! It's up to you to help him fly through the different levels in one piece, while avoiding enemies and obstacles. Can you get Norman safely back home? How to play Headcase? Use the arrow keys or WASD to move around! Use the spacebar to jump! Who created Headcase? Headcase was created by Nitrome. Play their other game on Poki: bucket, Canopy and sqauwk How can I play Headcase for free? You can play Headcase for free on Poki. Can I play Headcase on mobile devices and desktop? Headcase can be played on your computer.
